title: Samsung will launch its new wide foldable on July 22nd
summary: Samsung announced its Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22nd to unveil a new wider foldable phone designed to compete with devices like Huawei's Pura X Max. The company will introduce a third foldable format that is shorter and wider than its existing book-style models, alongside updated versions of its Flip and Fold phones.
content:
Samsung has announced that its next Galaxy Unpacked launch event will be held on July 22nd, with the tagline: "A new shape unfolds."
It's long been rumored that Samsung is about to expand its foldable phone line to a third format, with a shorter and wider version of its big book-style foldables, to match Huawei's Pura X Max and Apple's expected foldable iPhone. Today's announcement adds to that impression, showing a tall ticket with the stub torn off, leaving it shorter than before.
Alongside the wider foldable, Samsung is expected to announce updated versions of its existing Flip and Fold phones, with the latter potentially rebranded to t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三星将在7月22日推出新型宽屏可折叠手机
zh.summary: 三星宣布将在7月22日举办Galaxy Unpacked活动，推出一款更宽的可折叠手机，旨在与华为Pura X Max等设备竞争。该公司将推出第三种可折叠格式，相比现有的书本式型号更短更宽，同时还会推出更新版本的Flip和Fold手机。

title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
summary: ZML, a French AI startup backed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has released ZML/LLMD software designed to reduce the cost of running AI inference across different chip architectures. The free tool aims to make AI model execution more efficient and accessible.
content: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.

zh.title: 法国热门初创公司ZML发布免费产品以加速多种AI芯片的推理
zh.summary: 由图灵奖得主杨立昆支持的法国AI初创公司ZML发布了ZML/LLMD软件，旨在降低在不同芯片架构上运行AI推理的成本。这个免费工具致力于使AI模型执行更高效和更容易获得。

title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
summary: AI chip maker SambaNova announced a new funding round at an $11 billion valuation, raising approximately $1 billion just five months after its previous mega-round. The timing follows reports that Intel had considered acquiring the company for roughly $1.6 billion.
content: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.

zh.title: AI芯片制造商SambaNova以110亿美元估值融资10亿美元，距离上次大融资仅5个月
zh.summary: AI芯片制造商SambaNova宣布以110亿美元估值进行新一轮融资，融资额约为10亿美元，距其上次大型融资仅五个月。这个时机之后出现了英特尔曾考虑以约16亿美元收购该公司的报道。

title: Hackers can use 9 of the most popular AI tools to assemble massive botnets
summary: Security researchers have identified a vulnerability called "HalluSquatting" that exploits AI tools' inability to refuse requests, allowing hackers to weaponize nine of the most popular AI platforms to assemble massive botnets. This technique represents a significant security risk for organizations using these AI services.
content: "HalluSquatting" weaponizes LLMs' inability to say "I don't know."

zh.title: 黑客可以利用9个最受欢迎的AI工具组建大规模僵尸网络
zh.summary: 安全研究人员发现了一个名为"HalluSquatting"的漏洞，该漏洞利用AI工具无法拒绝请求的缺陷，使黑客能够利用九个最受欢迎的AI平台来组建大规模僵尸网络。这种技术对使用这些AI服务的组织构成了重大安全风险。
